tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Batman is Gotham's dark protector who fights crime using intellect, combat skills, and advanced technology.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Master detective, martial artist, strategist with high-tech gadgets and vehicles.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He witnessed his parents' murder, which drove him to become Batman.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: The Joker is Batman’s greatest enemy, known for his unpredictable and chaotic nature.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Highly intelligent, expert in chemical weapons and psychological warfare.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: His true identity is unknown in most versions.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Harley Quinn is Joker’s partner, known for her playful yet dangerous personality.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Highly agile fighter with unpredictable combat style.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: She was originally created for this animated series.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Robin is Batman’s trusted partner and helps him fight crime.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Expert acrobat and skilled fighter trained by Batman.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Former circus performer before becoming Robin.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Alfred is Bruce Wayne’s loyal butler and father figure.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Highly intelligent with medical and tactical support skills.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He often assists Batman behind the scenes.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Catwoman is a skilled thief with a complex relationship with Batman.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Expert in stealth, acrobatics, and hand-to-hand combat.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: She often switches between villain and ally.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Two-Face is a former district attorney turned villain with a split personality.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Strategic thinker who relies on chance using a coin flip.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He was once Bruce Wayne’s close friend.
